purpose: Real-data materialization registry for Relativity Living Light validation flows.
claim_boundary: No superiority claim unless real-data metrics pass predefined thresholds.

datasets.description: Pantheon+ / SH0ES Type Ia supernova data and covariance used for RLL vs LCDM expansion-history comparison.

candidate_remote_files.note: Some public releases expose the table as Pantheon+SH0ES.dat. If so, parser compatibility must be checked before renaming.
Covariance matrix required for covariance-aware Pantheon+ likelihood.

datasets.description: DESI DR2 BAO measurements for independent expansion-history and dark-energy cross-checks.
datasets.note: Registry placeholder. Materialization should use official DESI DR2 release tables and preserve exact provenance/DOI/reference before ingestion.

datasets.description: Planck 2018 / PR4 CMB parameters and likelihood products used only with explicit assumptions.
datasets.note: Do not silently mix Planck priors into Pantheon-only comparisons. Any CMB prior must be declared in the output artifact.

datasets.description: NASA OMNI solar wind / IMF products for heliospheric-radiative RLL blocks, not for direct LCDM comparison.
